name: @oiap/cli
description: Command-line tooling for building Open Interoperable Agent Plugin bundles.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd ../runtime build && tsc -p ../exporter-claude-code/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p ../exporter-codex/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p ../exporter-openclaw/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
